# João Lopes — joaolopes.dev.br

> Notes on software, systems, and thinking tools.

## About

João Lopes is a software engineer at Nubank and an AI-first practitioner.
He builds systems where AI agents are collaborators, not afterthoughts.
He writes from first-hand experience — no trend summaries, no documentation rewrites.

## Topics

- AI-first engineering: agents, skills, rules, hooks, MCP
- Knowledge systems: Obsidian vaults, zettelkasten, working memory for AI
- Developer tooling: Clojure, CLI, static site generation
- Career and craft: IC5 engineering, thinking tools, deliberate practice

## Blog

URL: https://joaolopes.dev.br
RSS: https://joaolopes.dev.br/feed.xml

## Posts

- Building Your AI Toolkit
  https://joaolopes.dev.br/posts/building-your-ai-toolkit/
  AI agents are runtime loops, not autocomplete. The five building blocks — CLI, MCP, Skills, Rules, and Hooks — and why the role shifts from writing code to designing workflows.

- Hello World
  https://joaolopes.dev.br/posts/hello-world/
  First post — what this blog is about, who's behind it, and the Obsidian + Clojure stack that powers it.
